message:
fix(runtime_compat): fix spawn_blocking return type + dual-runtime SendError match

Two fixes for asupersync-runtime feature path:
- spawn_blocking: wrap asupersync return in Ok() to match the tokio path's
  Result type, fixing compilation when asupersync-runtime feature is enabled
- mpsc SendError test: add cfg-gated match arms because asupersync uses
  SendError::Disconnected(value) enum variant while tokio uses a simple
  SendError(value) tuple struct

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
